changeSet.author: digitaltwinapp-api
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE digitaltwinapp.p2p_transactions DROP CONSTRAINT p2p_transactions_no_self, DROP COLUMN sender_user_id, DROP COLUMN recipient_user_id, DROP COLUMN currency_id;
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE digitaltwinapp.p2p_transactions ADD COLUMN sender_user_id BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, ADD COLUMN recipient_user_id BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, ADD COLUMN currency_id INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, ADD CONSTRAINT p2p_transactions_no_self CHECK (sender_user_id != recipient_user_id);
